message:
test(proptest): add 40 property-based tests for canary_rollout_controller

Covers phase state machine invariants, health check computation, advance/rollback
decision logic, assignment filtering conservation, canary agent selection,
metrics consistency, serde roundtrips, history bounding, reset, force transitions,
full lifecycle, and determinism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
